name: Roast Duck Stuffed with Apples and Grapes
recipeIngredient: Green apples, 4, cored and sliced, but not peeled
Sweet grapes, halved, seeded (or seedless), 1 1/2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover duck giblets with water in a small saucepan and simmer gently for 30 minutes. Drain, reserving 1/2 cup of the giblet-cooking liquid. Chop the giblets.
2. Mix chopped giblets, 1/2 cup giblet-cooking liquid, and stuffing ingredients.
3. Remove pinfeathers from duck; singe to remove hairs. Stuff neck and body cavities, skewer shut, and truss.
4. Prick duck skin all over with a sharp fork. Wrap remaining stuffing in aluminum foil.
5. Place duck breast side up on rack in large roasting pan. Put foil-wrapped stuffing beside bird.
6. Roast at 400°F for 1 hour, pricking duck skin with fork and basting every 20 minutes with cider.
7. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F. Continue roasting for 2 hours more, pricking duck and basting every 20 minutes with cider and drippings.
